articles.title: Weather Today [21 March 2026]: Check IMD Forecast, Snow & Rain Predictions for Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Chennai, Karnataka, Rajasthan, Jammu Kashmir, Ahmedabad, Punjab, Hyderabad, Uttar Pradesh - The Sunday Guardian

IMD Safety Advisory
Due to the possibility of thunderstorms and gusty winds in various states, the IMD suggests:
- Stay indoors and close windows during storms
- Avoid taking shelter under trees or near electrical objects
- Unplug electronic appliances if lightning is present
- Travelers in the Western Himalayas should be prepared for potential road disruptions
- In heatwave-affected areas, stay hydrated and avoid peak afternoon sun
